posts.author: lc_production (Production Lightcast)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be quite helpful if while filtering that there would be an option to avoid duplicates in a column.

We have multiple items for one client and when we filter for a certain status we only need to see it for one of those items but due us having multiple items for one client we get shown all of those items. So it would be helpful to set an option while filtering that allows to avoid duplicate entries in a column to avoid this.

Screenshot 2022-07-22 at 10.32.14744×344 29.9 KB
